name: Uber Technologies, Inc.
description: Uber Technologies, Inc. is an American multinational transportation company headquartered in San Francisco, California. It provides a wide range of services, including ride-hailing, food delivery through Uber Eats, courier services, and freight transport. Founded in 2009, the company has revolutionized urban mobility by connecting consumers with independent drivers and delivery partners through its mobile application. Operating in approximately 70 countries and hundreds of cities worldwide, Uber continues to innovate in the logistics and transportation sectors, leveraging technology to create efficient, on-demand solutions for millions of users and businesses globally.
